title: Adapted Screenplay Predictions - AwardsWatch
text: The site identifies One Battle After Another (Warner Bros) directed by Paul Thomas Anderson as a dominant favorite in the Adapted Screenplay category for the 2026 Oscars. AwardsWatch published monthly prediction updates throughout the 2025-2026 awards season, including editions for September 2025, October 2025, November 2025, December 2025, January 2026, and final predictions in March 2026. One article mentions considering whether films like No Other Choice and Bugonia might overlap thematically, suggesting competitive analysis among contenders. The site notes that screenplay categories have been months ahead in predictability, and references Writers Guild Award eligibility rules that eliminate certain top contenders from consideration.
